subject: warp not connecting to etomo
body:
Hi all,

I've been following along with the warp frame-series tutorial both with my 
own data and the EMPIAR dataset. I tried to run etomo with the commands 
verbatim from the website, but etomo failed to find the files. I checked 
the title of the directory and it's correct, so I'm unsure what's going on.

Has anyone else encountered this problem before? Here is the error code 
below.

Best,
Daniel

Error code:
System.ComponentModel.Win32Exception (2): An error occurred trying to start 
process 'batchruntomo' with working directory 
'/path/to/data/warp_tiltseries/tiltstack/TS_32'. No such file or directory
   at System.Diagnostics.Process.ForkAndExecProcess(ProcessStartInfo 
startInfo, String resolvedFilename, String[] argv, String[] envp, String 
cwd, Boolean setCredentials, UInt32 userId, UInt32 groupId, UInt32[] 
groups, Int32& stdinFd, Int32& stdoutFd, Int32& stderrFd, Boolean 
usesTerminal, Boolean throwOnNoExec)
   at System.Diagnostics.Process.StartCore(ProcessStartInfo startInfo)
   at WarpWorker.WarpWorker.EvaluateCommand(NamedSerializableObject 
Command) in /opt/warp/WarpWorker/WarpWorker.cs:line 447
